rows.label: qev050503_MSG0001
rows.name: Hey, wait... Please stop... Nooo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050503_MSG0002
rows.name:
P-Please do not raise your voice. I
merely have a request to make...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050503_MSG0003
rows.name: No... Someone, help! Nooo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050503_MSG0004
rows.name:
Please listen... to
the words of Ni Zain![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050503_MSG0005
rows.name:
Ah, you there! Please help me!
I was suddenly threatened...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050503_MSG0006
rows.name:
Do not speak such scandalous
words! I am not threatening you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050503_MSG0007
rows.name:
But... you suddenly grabbed
me by the lapels and told me
to listen to what you say...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050503_MSG0008
rows.name: How does that constitute a threat?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050503_MSG0009
rows.name: How does that NOT constitute a threat?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050503_MSG0010
rows.name:
Nnngh... You are a person who
refuses to listen to reason...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050503_MSG0011
rows.name: Th-That's my line...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050503_MSG0012
rows.name: N-n-nngh...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050503_MSG0014
rows.name:
This is getting us
nowhere... Hm?! You there![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050503_MSG0015
rows.name:
I knew it... Are you not the
BLADE who assisted me on the
battlefield the other day?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050503_MSG0016
rows.name:
I apologize for springing this on you
as you pass by, but could you... acquire
a reasonably sized sword for me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050503_MSG0017
rows.name: A-A sword...?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050503_MSG0018
rows.name: I believe that will expedite matters...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050503_MSG0019
rows.name: No... Wait a minute... Nooo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050503_MSG0020
rows.name:
Hurry, bring the sword! It is
not my desire to escalate this
situation any further![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050503_MSG0021
rows.name: Is the sword not ready yet...?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050503_MSG0022
rows.name:
I apologize for being impatient
when I am the one making the
request, but I ask that you hurry.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050503_MSG0023
rows.name:
My conversation with this lady has only
grown more complicated since then...![ST:wait ]
